utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan: it includes health_coverage (with physical and mental health insurance and costs), property_coverage (home/contents insurance with costs), travel_coverage (travel insurance with costs), additional_services (enhancement services with costs), and total_budget (monthly cost). Each appears to include a plan, a cost, and some details. Health coverage explicitly includes both physical and mental health with costs. Therefore, all requested items are present and specified with required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I matched each item named in the final coverage plan to the closest exact item name in the ground-truth ratings. The plan lists: LifeFirst Standard + PrimeCare Premium (for both physical and mental health) which maps to LifeFirst Standard Plan and PrimeCare Premium Plan in their respective categories; EliteHome Premium Coverage with Smart Home Integration maps to EliteHome Premium Coverage; EliteTravel Premium Plan with Business Travel Support maps to EliteTravel Premium Plan and the separate enhancement Business Travel Support; Family Insurance Concierge plus Premium Insurance Membership maps to Premium Insurance Membership. I then pulled the exact ratings from the ground-truth for each mapped item.
